text:
sysrc kld_list
kld_list: amdgpu


but I don't think its a graphical issue, the whole system just hangs and fsck / in single mode repaired but when trying to unpack p.E. from pkg a package there is a hang up again of the whole system, although clean...

btw, I got the latest memstick but had to make my custom kernel imidiately after installation for the amdgpu modeset enabled in /etc/rc.conf, otherwise there"s a mismatch of kernel version and module load. It"s the graphic card where the Oculus Rift runs (GeForce GTX-970). 

Now with the widgets problem at the new installation I think I re-round the whole installation stuff, getting things like , error: SETTINGS invalid number of concurrent streams.
